title: Introduce typed SieveError/SieveErrorKind
description: Replace compile() Result<CompiledScript, String> with SieveError struct (message: String, kind: SieveErrorKind) and enum SieveErrorKind { Utf8, Lex, Parse, UnsupportedExtension(String), InvalidRegex(String) }. Implement Display and std::error::Error. Update compile() signature to pub fn compile(script: &[u8]) -> Result<CompiledScript, SieveError>.
